scripts.preinstall: node -e "const ua = process.env.npm_config_user_agent || ''; if (!ua.startsWith('pnpm/')) { console.error('Use pnpm instead'); process.exit(1); }"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --names api,web --prefix-colors cyan,magenta "pnpm run dev:api" "pnpm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:web: cross-env PORT=3000 BASE_PATH=/ pnpm --filter @workspace/jarvis run dev
